title: ctenopteris corticola
intro: Ctenopteris corticola, also known as the New Zealand maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris corticola include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting wound healing, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Ctenopteris corticola can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses.
